short_summary: Iran deal close; gang strike abroad
rationale: US-Iran deal momentum continues with Hormuz reopening implications for oil prices; US airstrike killing Venezuelan gang leader is a new domestic-politics-relevant event.

top_events.title: US and Iran say deal is close; Hormuz reopening tied to agreement
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could lower oil prices and reduce military engagement costs for Americans; Trump's off-ramp diplomacy gains traction but no signed deal yet.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump announces US airstrike killed the leader of a Venezuelan gang active in the US; politically significant domestically as part of immigration/crime crackdown narrative.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Anthropic pauses AI tool rollout citing US government security concerns; signals growing federal scrutiny of AI deployment with potential regulatory implications.
